verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence from the landscape, botany, regulatory, and meta agents. It explicitly identified the key diagnostic features (double solid white lines, yellow-topped posts, volcanic soil) and correctly ruled out other candidates based on the consensus of the specialist agents.
